reviews.comment:
Tiene un lindo Full para ir a comer o comprar caramelos o comida, la atención es muy buena le ponen pila, trabajan bien, recomendado para cuando venís de vacaciones y te quedás sin nafta y lo mismo para la vuelta

(Translated by Google)
It has a nice Full to go eat or buy candy or food, the service is very good, they put a lot of effort into it, they work well, recommended for when you come back on vacation and you run out of gas and the same for the return
